headline: Deloitte Frames AI as Healthcare Reshape
summary: Deloitte published research positioning generative AI as a fundamental healthcare transformation that will reshape care delivery models, patient engagement, and organizational operations across the enterprise.
so_what: Deloitte is positioning generative AI as a fundamental healthcare transformation, not just operational improvement. This shapes how boards think about AI investment.
original_title: Generative AI to Reshape the Future of Health Care
